rationale: No qualitative change affecting Poland this cycle — Iran deal uncertainty continues, energy price implications remain but unchanged; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran nuclear deal keeps oil supply outlook unclear, indirectly affecting energy prices in Poland. No resolution yet — same pattern as previous cycles.

top_events.title: Thousands rally in Rome for rival pro- and anti-migration marches
top_events.summary: Large migration-related protests in Italy signal ongoing EU-wide tension over immigration policy, a topic Polish residents follow given border pressures and EU political dynamics.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US federal AI policy development continues but has no direct impact on daily life in Poland at this stage.
